did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper primarily uses Vibrational Optical Coherence Tomography (VOCT) and quantitative physical data analysis (resonant frequency and modulus measurements) to differentiate skin lesions. While the abstract and introduction mention that artificial intelligence could be used to analyze the collected data remotely to improve diagnosis, the study itself does not report using AI/ML/DL methods to obtain its results; it relies on physical biomarker measurements and statistical analysis of VOCT data.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
